name: verdant
description: Verdant — AI-native breeding management + analysis platform. Monorepo root (ADR-0012).

scripts.test:kernel: Rscript services/kernel/tests/correctness.R && Rscript services/kernel/tests/data-quality-test.R && Rscript services/kernel/tests/model-qc-test.R
scripts.test: pnpm contracts:test && pnpm test:kernel && pnpm test:evals
